overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic sci-fi environment featuring dramatic neon-lit skies and angular architecture. The player exits a covered structure and walks along an elevated path overlooking a distant cityscape before approaching a high-tech building entrance with glowing orange doors.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a dark concrete overhang with metal support beams. As the camera moves forward, it exits the covered area onto an open walkway with metal safety railings, revealing a dramatic night sky with aurora effects and a distant illuminated city skyline beyond rocky terrain.

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open elevated walkway with full view of the neon-lit aurora sky above. The path curves slightly left, passing rocky outcrops on the right while a large angular metal building comes into view on the left side of the frame.

glowing orange door panels become prominently illuminated as camera nears entrance

tall thin poles with red neon lighting flanking the entrance

dark angular metal panels with green tinted sections

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the entrance of the angular metal building, which now dominates the frame. The ground transitions to patterned paved tiles as the glowing orange geometric door and red vertical light poles become the focal point. The distant city and safety railings fade from view as the camera moves toward the illuminated entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered industrial overhang into a vast, neon-lit futuristic landscape that culminates at a high-tech building entrance. It begins beneath a dark concrete ceiling with metal support beams, moving forward to exit the cover onto an open walkway where a dramatic aurora sky and a distant illuminated skyline suddenly reveal themselves. As the camera continues along the elevated path, the view expands to encompass rocky outcrops and the shimmering night sky before the trajectory curves left to bring a large, angular metal building into focus. The scene then shifts from the open air to a more enclosed approach, with the ground transitioning to patterned paved tiles as the distant city fades. Finally, the camera closes in on the structure, centering on a glowing orange geometric door and red vertical light poles that dominate the frame.
